goal_results.evidence: WarpSpecializeUtility.cpp:97 — lambda capture changed from `idx = idx` to `idx = static_cast<unsigned>(idx)`, matching the oracle fix exactly. Test gates gate_a_barrier_arg and gate_b_callop_arg both passed.
